recommendations.title: Enhance BRSR ESG Disclosures
recommendations.description: Improve and fully disclose ESG metrics under BRSR to avoid SEBI scrutiny and potential trading restrictions.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoiding a 20-40 bps increase in cost of capital on ₹30,000 Cr market cap saves ₹60-120 Cr annually.

recommendations.title: Pursue EU Taxonomy Alignment
recommendations.description: Identify and increase green activities to align with EU Taxonomy, unlocking green financing options and lowering cost of capital.
recommendations.profitability_link: Reducing cost of capital by 50 bps on ₹30,000 Cr market cap saves ₹150 Cr annually in financing costs.

recommendations.title: Develop Coal Transition Roadmap
recommendations.description: Create and publish a clear transition plan to reduce coal dependency aligned with TCFD recommendations to mitigate transition risks and improve investor confidence.
recommendations.profitability_link: Reducing P/E compression by 5-10% on ₹30,000 Cr market cap can increase valuation by ₹1,500-3,000 Cr.

recommendations.title: Improve GRI ESG Reporting Quality
recommendations.description: Strengthen GRI disclosures to enhance ESG ratings and reduce risk of fund outflows from ESG-sensitive investors.
recommendations.profitability_link: Preventing fund outflows equivalent to 1% of ₹30,000 Cr market cap saves ₹300 Cr in valuation loss.
